title: SENIOR MANAGER - HIG HBM PSE
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • People Leadership Excellence:

  • Build and Grow the Team: Drive assertive hiring and onboarding to establish a strong technical organization in Singapore. Create diverse pipelines and equitable processes aligned with Micron’s Talent Acquisition playbook.

  • Develop Talent: Implement structured onboarding, coaching rhythms, and skill-based development plans. Identify strengths and gaps, provide career guidance, and enable continuous learning.

  • Foster Engagement & Culture: Model Micron values and inclusive leadership. Create an environment where team members feel empowered, supported, and motivated to succeed.

  • Performance Management: Set clear goals, define success metrics, and hold the team accountable. Conduct performance appraisals, provide recognition, and drive continuous improvement.

  • Leadership Influence: Act as a trusted partner to cross-functional stakeholders (Design, Verification, Quality, System Engineering) and align team execution with HBM program milestones.

  • Strategic & Operational Leadership:

  • Establish operating mechanisms, dashboards, and KPIs for validation coverage, cycle time, and detection efficiency.

  • Ensure readiness for current and future HBM products through proactive planning and risk management.

  • Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance efficiency and quality across validation processes.

  • Technical Oversight:

  • Provide direction on validation priorities, resource allocation, and readiness for MBIST and Native Mode execution.

  • Collaborate with global teams on material screening, debug strategies, and platform enablement to ensure execution readiness.

  • Stay informed on emerging technologies (HBM4E, high-speed I/O, advanced test platforms) and guide the team toward future capability development.

Minimum Qualifications

  • Master's in Microelectronics (or related).

  • 10+ years in DRAM/HBM/NAND product and validation engineering, with 5+ years in technical leadership roles managing teams across global sites.

  • At least 2 years of HBM Validation experience.

  • Proven ability to lead people, set strategy, and deliver results in a fast-paced, cross-functional environment.

  • Strong communication, collaboration, and stakeholder management skills.

  • Familiarity with validation methodologies and platforms (MBIST, Native Mode) preferred; ability to guide technical teams effectively.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience building new teams or organizations in a global, multi-site environment.

  • Demonstrated success in talent development and succession planning.

  • Exposure to operational excellence frameworks and continuous improvement initiatives.

Leadership Expectations

  • Hire, develop, and retain top talent; build diverse pipelines and equitable processes per Talent Acquisition playbook.

  • Set clear goals, coaching rhythms, and skill-based development plans; leverage Micron’s structured onboarding and learning content.

  • Influence cross-functional stakeholders and align execution to HBM program milestones.

    Work Authorization & Relocation

    Micron supports Singapore Employment Pass application and onboarding logistics for qualified candidates; timelines may vary by external authorities.

    Travel

    Occasional travel to partner sites (Boise, Folsom, Hyderabad, Taiwan) for material readiness, platform checkout, and joint debug.

postedCompany.description:
MICRON SEMICONDUCTOR ASIA OPERATIONS PTE LTD is a subsidiary of Micron Technology, Inc.  (‘Micron’).

Micron is a global leader in the semiconductor industry. For more than 35 years, Micron has dedicated itself to collaborating with customers and partners to engineer technology that drives innovation and transforms what’s possible.  Micron offers the industry’s broadest portfolio of silicon-to-semiconductor memory solutions—starting with foundational DRAM, NAND, and NOR Flash memory, and extending to SSDs, modules, MCPs, HMC, and other semiconductor systems. This best-in-class technology powers leading-edge computing, consumer, enterprise server and storage, networking, embedded, automotive, industrial, and mobile products.

Micron is strategically located in Singapore to efficiently and effectively accommodate its global customers, while also serving as the base of the company’s worldwide operations. Singapore is home to Micron’s largest manufacturing footprint with three fabrication facilities, an upcoming fabrication facility expansion, and a test and assembly facility. Its presence in Singapore also includes a technology center supporting innovation across the company and a sales and marketing office that offers all Micron memory products to our regional customers.

Micron provides opportunities for team members’ personal and career development through challenging work assignments, training and educational programs. We hire, train, develop, and educate a workforce that is competent in performing job expectations by providing orientation, job specific training, professional certifications, external training and various continuous learning opportunities.

As Micron enters into a new era of growth, its presence in Singapore plays an important role in its worldwide operations and overall success.
postedCompany.name: MICRON SEMICONDUCTOR ASIA OPERATIONS PTE. LTD.
